RothagHuptiq.Rat.Name: Rat

RothagHuptiq.Rat.AdoptionDialogue1: Hello @!$h#$b#You see this cute rat here?

RothagHuptiq.Rat.AdoptionDialogue3: I think it likes this place! Hey, um.... Don't you think it would do you well if it stuck around?$h
RothagHuptiq.Rat.AdoptionDialogue4: Well, little %pet... You be a good rat now... okay?
